description.p: Vernier is a native pixel-measurement overlay for designers and developers. Edge-detected snaps lock to real element bounds, with sticky guides, pinned measurements, and region capture for one-click hand-off to your annotation tool.
Press Enter on a measurement to copy the value to the system clipboard. Works on macOS, Linux (Wayland), and Windows.

screenshot.caption: Measuring a 320×160 px region with edge-detected snaps locked to the element bounds

ul.li: record chords through the daemon + bundle Adwaita Sans
render the overlay at the true fractional display scale
scale HUD strokes to the display + track monitor changes live
fix cargo fmt + macOS clippy on the chord-recording PR
paint the frozen screenshot as the overlay background
drop needless return in macOS handoff cfg block
get clippy and fmt clean on workspace (CI was failing)
clear CI-gate lint debt — fmt matrix, ChipSeg cfg, Cmd boxing
modernize objc2 usage, fix CGImage api, pin toolchain ([#15](https://github.com/jondkinney/vernier/pull/15))
